name: KKO International SA
summary: KKO International SA, through its subsidiary, cultivates, sells, and exports cocoa beans worldwide. The company is also involved in the cultivation of teak trees, yams, and manioc. As of December 31, 2017, it owned 2,580 hectares of land on which 800,000 cocoa trees are planted. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Paris, France.
